nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: Slaty egret
nodes.summary: Slaty egret（Slaty egret，学名 Egretta vinaceigula），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于赞比亚、波札那，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动、湿地排水。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 赞比亚
nodes.summary: 赞比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联182种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等182种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 波札那
nodes.summary: 波札那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联117种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Red-billed spurfowl、Natal spurfowl等117种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The largest populations are found in Zambia and Botswana

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The largest populations are found in Zambia and Botswana

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is classified as Vulnerable, the biggest threat being habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: As a species the slaty egret is highly dependent on seasonal marshes which are threatened by human factors such as drainage (for cultivation), flood regulation and dams as along the Kafue River, the erosion of river catchments, water abstraction for irrigation, invasive non-native vegetation, human disturbance including excessive trampling and over grazing by livestock and the harvesting of reeds and other marsh vegetation for human use

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: As a species the slaty egret is highly dependent on seasonal marshes which are threatened by human factors such as drainage (for cultivation), flood regulation and dams as along the Kafue River, the erosion of river catchments, water abstraction for irrigation, invasive non-native vegetation, human disturbance including excessive trampling and over grazing by livestock and the harvesting of reeds and other marsh vegetation for human use
